message:
feat(engine): add 237 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Fourteenth batch of enrichment tests:

- phase_gate: 41 tests (gate IDs, statuses, metrics, thresholds,
  evaluator lifecycle, all 4 gate types, boundary values)
- policy_controller: 39 tests (loss matrices, posteriors, guardrails,
  action selection, safe defaults, evidence building, determinism)
- policy_theorem_compiler: 44 tests (capabilities, merge operators,
  formal properties, compilation, monotonicity, machine check hooks)
- promise_model: 58 tests (promise states, microtask/macrotask queues,
  event loop turns, combinators all/allSettled/race/any, virtual clock)
- proof_obligations: 55 tests (obligation categories, builtin
  templates, binding/evaluation, auto-evaluate, waiver policies)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
